name: Gift-Idea Match Board
description: Create a privacy-light gift-idea match board that maps recipients, occasions, interests, constraints, and thoughtful idea candidates without collecting sensitive personal data, giving financial advice, or using shopping links.
use_cases: Create a recipient-to-occasion gift planning board.
Compare thoughtful gift candidates without opening shopping links.
Track privacy-light gift clues, constraints, and future notes.
safety_notes: Do not collect sensitive personal data, private identifiers, account details, or confidential information.
No financial advice; use only user-supplied comfort ranges or effort levels if needed.
No shopping links, affiliate links, tracking links, or vendor-specific pushes.
Flag sensitive or uncertain preferences for confirmation instead of guessing.
